name: Tank
description: Identify the Tank by its rectangular case with strong vertical 'brancards' (the bars flanking the dial that echo a tank's tracks), Roman numerals, a railway minute track, blued sword hands, and a sapphire cabochon crown. It may come in variants like: Tank Louis, Tank Must, Tank Française, and Tank Américaine.

name: Santos
description: Identify the Santos by its square case with a rounded, screw-set bezel showing eight exposed screws and an integrated bracelet — one of the first purpose-built pilot's wristwatches. It may come in variants like: steel, two-tone gold-and-steel, and skeleton dials.

name: Ballon Bleu
description: Identify the Ballon Bleu by its rounded case with a blue sapphire cabochon crown tucked into a protective bulge that arcs over the dial, Roman numerals, and a railway track. It may come in variants like: silver dial, and steel or two-tone cases across several sizes.
